supplier_lead.body:
Hi {{ username }},

Thank you for joining {{ company_name }} as a Supplier Lead. Your account is now active. You can log in here to manage supplier relationships, approve vendor proposals, and oversee procurement operations.

If you have any questions or need assistance, you can reach out to us at {{ support_email }}. We’re here to support you.

vendor.header: Vendor Access Activated — Welcome to {{ company_name }}, {{ username }}
vendor.body:
Hello {{ username }},

Welcome to the {{ company_name }} vendor network! Your vendor account is now active. Visit your dashboard at this link to manage orders, update your catalog and pricing, and collaborate with our procurement team.

If you need any assistance, feel free to reach out at {{ support_email }}.

branch_manager.body:
Hi {{ username }},

Welcome aboard as a Branch Manager for {{ company_name }}! You now have access to your branch dashboard. There, you can approve trip requests, monitor performance, and manage your team.

To get started, log in here.

If you’d like any help or a walkthrough, just drop us a message at {{ support_email }}.

customer.header: Welcome to {{ company_name }}, {{ username }} — Your Account Is Ready!
customer.body:
Hello {{ username }},

Your account on {{ company_name }} has been successfully created. You can log in now and begin using the platform.

If you have any questions or want a quick start guide, don’t hesitate to contact us at {{ support_email }}.

national_manager.body:
Hello {{ username }},

We’re excited to have you join the team as a National Manager! Your role will involve overseeing performance across regions, tracking KPIs, and driving strategic growth.

To dive in, log in here to access national-level dashboards.

If you need any support or a guided walkthrough, just write to us at {{ support_email }}.

corporate_admin.body:
Hi {{ username }},

Your corporate admin account at {{ company_name }} is now set up. You have full access to administrative tools, user management, and system settings.

Log in via this link to get started.

If you face any issues or need help configuring things, feel free to contact us at {{ support_email }}.

accountant.body:
Hello {{ username }},

Welcome to the finance team at {{ company_name }}! Your accountant account is now active, giving you access to billing, reconciliation, and payment dashboards.

You can log in here to check pending payments and manage financial operations.

If you need help or training on our finance module, reach out at {{ support_email }}.

supervisor.body:
Hi {{ username }},

Welcome aboard as a Supervisor! You’ll be overseeing field operations, guiding field executives, and ensuring tasks are completed efficiently.

Get started by logging in here to view your team dashboard.

If you’d like a walkthrough or need any help, we’re always here at {{ support_email }}.

regional_manager.body:
Hi {{ username }},

Welcome to your role as Regional Manager at {{ company_name }}. You now have access to region-wide metrics, branch performance, and strategic dashboards.

To begin, log in here.

If you’d like a tour of the management tools, drop us a message at {{ support_email }}.

field_executive.body:
Hello {{ username }},

Thanks for joining {{ company_name }} as a Field Executive! You’ll be working directly in the field—managing pickups, deliveries, and trip coordination.

You can log in here to start checking your assignments.

If you need guidance on using our tools or want more info, feel free to reach out at {{ support_email }}.

admin.header: Welcome to the Admin Console, {{ username }}
admin.body:
Hi {{ username }},

Your admin account at {{ company_name }} is now live. You have full access to system settings, user management, and role configurations.

To get started, log in here.

If you want a walkthrough or need help setting permissions, just write to us at {{ support_email }}.

management.header: Welcome to the Leadership Team, {{ username }}
management.body:
Hello {{ username }},

We’re thrilled to have you in the management team at {{ company_name }}. In this role, you’ll oversee key operations, set strategic direction, and drive company growth.

Log in via this link to view high-level dashboards and reports.

If you’d like a tour of the leadership tools or need help navigating, reach out to us at {{ support_email }}.

active.body:
Dear {{ username }},

We’re pleased to inform you that your account status has been updated to Active. You now have full access to all features.

If you have any questions or need support, please contact us at {{ support_email }}.

inactive.header: Your {{ company_name }} Account Has Been Deactivated
inactive.body:
Dear {{ username }},

We regret to inform you that your account is now Inactive, so access to the platform is currently disabled.

If this is unexpected or you’d like to reactivate, please reach out to us at {{ support_email }}.

pending.header: Your {{ company_name }} Account Is Pending Approval
pending.body:
Hi {{ username }},

Thank you for registering with {{ company_name }}. Your account is currently under review and in a Pending status.

We’ll notify you as soon as it’s approved. In the meantime, if you have any questions or want to provide additional information, you can reply to this email or contact {{ support_email }}.

request.body:
Hello {{ username }},

We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to set a new one:

Reset Your Password

If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email or contact support if you have concerns.

confirmation.body:
Hello {{ username }},

This is a confirmation that the password for your account has just been changed. If you did not make this change, please contact our support team immediately at {{ support_email }}.

pending.body: Your trip request has been created and is currently pending approval. Our team will review it and notify you once the status is updated.

approved.body: Good news! Your trip has been approved by the Branch Manager. Further steps will be initiated shortly.

rejected.body: We regret to inform you that your trip request has been rejected by the Branch Manager. Please contact support for more details.

vendor_assigned.body: A vendor has been successfully assigned to your trip. The logistics for the trip are now being arranged.

driver_assigned.body: A driver has been assigned to your trip. You will receive updates related to vehicle movement soon.

fleet_rate_approve.body: The flit rate for your trip has been reviewed and approved. The trip process will continue as scheduled.

flit_rate_reject.body: The proposed flit rate for your trip has been rejected by the management. Please review and submit a revised rate.

vehicle_loaded.body: The vehicle for your trip has been successfully loaded and is ready for dispatch.

vehicle_unloaded.body: The vehicle has been unloaded at the destination. The next steps in the trip process will follow shortly.

advance_payment.body: The accounts team has processed the advance payment for your trip. You may proceed with the planned operations.

pod_submitted.body: The Proof of Delivery (POD) has been successfully submitted.

in_transit.body: Your trip is currently in transit. You will be notified when it reaches the destination or when the status changes.

completed.body: Your trip has been successfully completed. Thank you for using our service.

national_manager.header: New Complaint Assigned — Complaint ID: {{ complaint_id }}
national_manager.body:
Hello {{ username }},

A new complaint has been assigned to you. Here are the details:

  • Complaint ID: {{ complaint_id }}
  • Created by: {{ created_by }}
  • User Details: {{ user_details }}
  • Related Customer/Vendor ID: {{ related_entity_id }}

Please View Complaint and take the necessary action.

If you have any questions, reach out to us at {{ support_email }}.

branch_manager.body:
Hello {{ username }},

The complaint with ID {{ complaint_id }} is now In Progress. Our team is actively working on it.

You can view the complaint for more details and next steps.

If you have any questions or additional input, feel free to reach out at {{ support_email }}.

Hello {{ username }},

Good news! The complaint with ID {{ complaint_id }} has been Resolved.

You can view the resolution details and confirm that everything is in order.

If there’s anything further required or if you’d like to reopen the ticket, please contact us at {{ support_email }}.

user.body:
Hi {{ username }},

We’re writing to let you know that your account has been blocked.

You can see the resolution here and provide feedback if you like.

If you’re not satisfied or have more information to share, feel free to reply or contact us at {{ support_email }}.

branch_manager.body:
Hello {{ username }},

The complaint with ID {{ complaint_id }} has now been Closed. All actions have been completed.

You can view the full complaint record if needed.

If you think something was missed or want to reopen it, please reach out at {{ support_email }}.
